items.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra produces proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture [pdf]
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra 声称证明循环双覆盖猜想
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra Claims Proof of Cycle Double Cover Conjecture
items.summary: AI model GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra reportedly generates a proof for the unsolved Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in graph theory.

items.title: 长征十号乙完成一子级海上回收，为全球首次网系回收
items.title_zh: 长征十号乙完成全球首次网系火箭回收
items.title_en: Long March 10B Achieves First Grid-Based Rocket Recovery
items.summary: 长征十号乙火箭成功实现一子级海上网系回收，为中国首次并创全球先例。

items.title: QuadRF can spot drones and see WiFi through my wall
items.title_zh: QuadRF：开源射频相机可探测无人机并可视化WiFi信号
items.title_en: QuadRF: Open-Source RF Camera Spots Drones and Sees WiFi Signals
items.summary: QuadRF is an open-source device that uses RF augmented reality to visualize wireless signals and detect drones.

items.title: Write code like a human will maintain it
items.title_en: Write Code for Humans, Not AI
items.summary: An article advocating for writing code with human maintainability in mind, with Hacker News discussion focusing on LLM code quality and workflow improvements.

items.title: On Adversarial RL [R]
items.title_zh: 对抗强化学习：多智能体PPO中评论家攻击比演员攻击更强
items.title_en: Adversarial RL: Critic Attacks Stronger Than Actor in Multi-Agent PPO
items.summary: A user reports that critic-based adversarial attacks on multi-agent PPO are stronger than actor-based attacks, contradicting findings from the SA-MDP framework in single-agent settings.

items.title: 中国法院多起判例认定游戏账号可继承，平台禁止条款无效
items.title_zh: 中国法院认定游戏账号可继承，平台禁令无效
items.title_en: Chinese Courts Rule Game Accounts Inheritable, Platform Bans Void
items.summary: 中国法院在多起判例中认定游戏账号等虚拟资产可继承，平台禁止条款无效。

items.title: 🐧 腾讯洽购 AI 公司 Manus，拟从 📱 Meta 手中回购成为最大股东
items.title_zh: 腾讯洽购AI初创公司Manus，拟从Meta手中回购
items.title_en: Tencent in Talks to Acquire AI Startup Manus from Meta
items.summary: Tencent is in talks to acquire AI startup Manus, becoming its largest shareholder by repurchasing from Meta for at least $2 billion.

items.title: 🤖 OpenAI、🔵 Google 疑似向美方黑名单上的中国公司提供 AI 模型
items.title_zh: OpenAI和Google被指控向黑名单上的中国公司提供AI模型
items.title_en: OpenAI, Google Accused of AI Model Supply to Blacklisted Chinese Firms
items.summary: OpenAI and Google allegedly provide advanced AI models to Chinese companies via Singapore subsidiaries, circumventing US blacklist restrictions.

items.title: 📱 Meta 因 Facebook 和 Instagram 成瘾设计或遭欧盟罚款 120 亿美元
items.title_zh: Meta 因成瘾设计或遭欧盟罚款 120 亿美元
items.title_en: Meta Faces $12B EU Fine for Addictive Design
items.summary: Meta faces potential $12 billion EU fine for addictive design features on Facebook and Instagram violating the Digital Services Act.
